title: Razor cartridge comprising mechanochromic layer
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a razor cartridge including a housing having a front edge and a rear edge; at least one razor blade disposed between the front edge and the rear edge; and a mechanochromic layer disposed on the at least one razor blade, wherein the mechanochromic layer comprises a mechanochromic material.
claims: 1. A razor cartridge comprising: a housing having a front edge and a rear edge, at least one razor blade disposed between the front edge and the rear edge, and a mechanochromic layer disposed on the at least one razor blade, wherein the mechanochromic layer comprises a mechanochromic material.
